title: Cisco IOS — DHCP snooping with ACL

source.description: DHCP snooping enabled on VLANs with trusted uplink, plus a VLAN ACL to block P2P traffic

config.description: DHCP snooping with trusted port on trunk, untrusted access ports, and VLAN ACL filtering P2P traffic on internal VLAN

expected_translation.high_level: Huawei VRP equivalent with dhcp snooping enable, dhcp snooping trust (port), and traffic-filter with acl

verification.notes: clean deployable — RC3 live verification: DHCP snooping globally and per-VLAN enabled, trunk port has dhcp snooping trust, access ports untrusted. ACL BLOCK_P2P correctly mapped to numbered ACL with traffic-filter inbound on Vlanif10. Must_include keywords all present.
